skills.name: Stop
skills.description: Stops time of monsters within the targeted area. Enemies do not receive damage when time is stopped. (Nullify damage and immune to buff/debuff)

skills.name: Slow
skills.description: Controls time to decrease the movement speed of enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Movement Speed: - CaptionRatio
Target: CaptionRatio3
Magic Circle Duration: 10 seconds
[Slow] Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Backmasking
skills.description: Control time in an area, temporarily changing it back to its previous state.
skills.effect_text:
Backmasking range CaptionRatio
Cannot use backmasking in the nearby area for 10 seconds

skills.name: Pass
skills.description: Reduces the cooldown of your skills and those of your party members. The individual skill cooldowns cannot be reduced again until given the skill is used.

skills.name: Quick Cast
skills.description: Reduces skill casting time. The reduced casting time will not surpass 90% of the original casting time.

skills.name: Time Forward
skills.description: Increases the cooldown of a random skill belonging to an enemy within range.

attributes.name: Reincarnate: Two
Stop: Control Boss Monster
attributes.description:
* Allows [Stop] to also stop the boss monster (Legend Raid Boss or Field Boss, Boruta does not apply)

* Once the boss is caught, it will not be caught again

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Pass: Additional Reduction
attributes.description:
* Offers a 0.5% chance per attribute level of reducing cooldown by an additional 5 seconds when using [Pass]

* Cooldown Reduction differs depending on each skill.

attributes.name: Stop: Break Time
attributes.description:
* Applies [Stop] to yourself instead for 5 seconds, removing all removable debuffs.

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Slow: Enchant Slow
attributes.description:
* The caster receives [Enchant Slow] buff when casting [Slow]

* 1% chance per attribute level to apply [Slow] to enemies upon attack

* Cannot be used along with [Enchant Lethargy] and cannot be used in PvP

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Reincarnate: Ally
attributes.description:
{#ff0000}[Cannot use in PVP area]{/}

* Changes [Reincarnate] into a buff that applies to party members

* While active, the buff prevents one from becoming incapable of combat once and restores full HP

* Same duration as Reincarnate

* Increases Cooldown by 60 seconds

attributes.name: Pass: Focus Time
attributes.description:
* Applies [Pass] to yourself only, increasing its effects by 2x

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Time Forward: Attack Skills
attributes.description:
* Applies [Time Forward] to the cooldown of attack skills only

* 10% chance per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Quick Cast: Increase Accuracy
attributes.description:
* Reduces the chances of your magic attacks missing the target by 5% per attribute level while [Quick Cast] is active

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Reincarnate: Enhance
attributes.description:
{#ff0000}[Cannot use in PVP area]{/}

* Increases [Reincarnate]'s success chances by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Backmasking: Mystery
attributes.description: * Reverts your location, HP, and SP to that of the last time you used [Backmasking]

attributes.name: [Arts] Slow: Absorb Time
attributes.description: * Slowing enemies decreases their Movement Speed by half, and your Movement Speed increases by the amount they lost

attributes.name: [Arts] Stop: Aging
attributes.description:
* Original function is removed, decreases the ability of enemy affected by stop by 10%

- Attack

- Healing

- Block Penetration

- Critical Attack

- Critical Rate

- Accuracy
